title: Font
text: Font Name of a logical font to be used for menus, as specified in the initialization file. If not specified, the Windows system default font is used. This property can only be set in the .ini file. For valid values, see the usys.ini file. [application] menu=umenu(Font= LogicalFont ) Copy Example: Setting the Font Used for Menus ;usys.ini file [application] menu=umenu(font=SansMedium) Copy Applies To Menu Objects Was this topic helpful?
